title: World Flags
description: Adds 50+ handy Recipes for Banners in the Design of Flags.
body:
![World Flags Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5638f2eda36c0871451b1652e1e8dc008ea4a9ee.png)
Disclaimer: The Banners are selected on how good they are able to be re-created ingame. The Selection of Flags holds no political meaning. The eventual Goal is to add every flag to this Datapack to have a collection available for everyone. This Datapack adds more than 50 handy Recipes to quickly craft Flags of different Countries. ## рџ“ѓ List of All Recipes

## рџ“— How to add all Recipes to the Recipe Book? ### Without Commands Craft the **World Flags Knowledge Book**. Right click it to consume it and gain all the recipes without a command. ![World Flags Knowledge Books Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2586c676f283a224abcc304fb6c60d04f7d7a17.png) To craft Knowledge Books, you will need "[Craftable Knowledge Book](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-knowledge-book)". ### With Commands You can add all recipes to the Recipe Book by using the command `/function world_flags:unlock_all_recipes`. If you want to give all players all Recipes, use `/execute as @a run function world_flags:unlock_all_recipes` instead. ## рџ¤ќ Special Thanks & Attributions Thanks to all the Members of Planet Minecraft who inspired many of the more complex Banner Designs! ## рџ› пёЏ Installation ### Datapack Installation Guide Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world. ### Mod installation Guide Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides. ## вќ—Issues and Suggestions Please report issues on [My Discord](https://discord.gg/R2G6EMW42H). ## рџ”Ѓ Optional Dependencies - [Craftable Knowledge Book](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-knowledge-book) (recommended)
